item.title: Matthew Perry talks about the American dream
item.description: Clip from 'Matthew Perry shares his incredible story of survival and why fame wasn't the answer to his problems' https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=vrZsyBhmMro Police announced Matthew Perry’s personal assistant, two doctors and others have been indicted and charged with providing the ketamine that caused the death of the “Friends” star.

item.title: Rest in peace my beautiful Link
item.description: My beautiful Link had a heart attack and went to the rainbow bridge. He was standing one second, dead the next. I can’t get over it or over him. What do I do now??

item.dc:creator: huntsnhava40

item.title: Some of my favorite rainbow outfits
item.description:
the crayon earrings are actually chapstick!
neat fact: The decal on the Rubik's-themed Etch A Sketch was illustrated by me!
This photo was snapped in Paris! The shoes are actually pink (don't tell anyone)
These pillows are IKEA's magnum opus
You can't really see the earrings in this photo but I lost one of them at an Erasure concert and life's never been the same
most the time I take photos with an awkwardly long self-timer and there's a lot of running back-and-forth to my phone
one of the very last times I visited my alma mater before it shut down :(
Usually I don't weat pink in rainbows but I made an exception for this outfit. Wasn't til later that I realized how much I vibed with this barbie
item.dc:creator: pikajane

item.dc:creator: Raoul97533

item.title: Return of the Meme: 1082 (melt rage)
item.description:
I really should start all these Meme collections with a bread meme every day, but I would totally forget after doing it once or twice. Anyway, let's get this bread.
Well shit, count me and Pippin in then.
"Cooper, what is she doing? "Docking." (If a woman did this to me, I would be laughing so hard I couldn't breathe. And then be uh, unable to breathe anyway I guess?
Or the latest banger from Farya Faraji.
Wheeeeeeee
Black Phoebe
Ostrom in my house is a hero, and so is Bakker. Someday I need to tell the story about how I corrected Dr. Bakker when i was 7, when he was at a public lecture.
Mood.
Yuuuup
*probably* Black-throated Sparrow for me.
Accurate mood.
I'd play.
The passion in this post, man.
Heresy? On my Tumblr? It's more likely than you think.
I've seen this with a lot of Orthodox converts too.
I feel like this was painted with googly eyes. Athenian kylix, 5th century BC
If I fits, I sits.
Pippin tax! Today's message from Pippin: "Oh boy! Good boy! Why Thank you! Baby! You're a good boy."
item.dc:creator: CodyBurkett
